wizard.eventOptionTitle: When something happens in an app
wizard.triggerDescription: Pick the app to watch. You'll say what should happen in it in the chat.
wizard.webhookTitle: Wake it from a web address
wizard.webhookDescription: You'll get a unique web address that wakes this routine whenever anything calls it.

intake.startTitle: How do you want to start?
intake.templatePickTitle: Pick a template to start from

morningBriefing.name: Morning briefing
morningBriefing.description: A weekday summary of your day ahead
morningBriefing.intent: Every weekday morning, send me a short briefing of my day ahead: what is on my calendar, anything urgent, and what I should focus on.

weeklyReview.name: Weekly review
weeklyReview.description: A Friday recap of your week
weeklyReview.intent: Every Friday afternoon, give me a recap of the week: what got done, what is still open, and what is coming up next week.

deadlineReminders.name: Deadline reminders
deadlineReminders.description: A daily nudge before things are due
deadlineReminders.intent: Each day, remind me about upcoming deadlines and anything due soon, so nothing slips through the cracks.

inboxTriage.name: Inbox triage
inboxTriage.description: Summarize new emails as they arrive
inboxTriage.intent: When a new email arrives, summarize it for me and flag anything that needs my attention.

newsDigest.name: News digest
newsDigest.description: A morning roundup of news you care about
newsDigest.intent: Every morning, put together a short digest of the latest news on the topics I care about.

triggerStep.title: Pick an app
triggerStep.searchToConnect: Search to connect a new app
triggerStep.connectReason: Connect {{app}} to watch it for events
triggerStep.connectKeyReason: Add your {{app}} key to watch it for events
triggerStep.selectedHint: You'll say what should happen in {{app}} in the chat.
triggerStep.catalogError: Couldn't load this app's events. Check your connection and try again.

grid.emptyDescription: Create your first one and Houston will take care of the rest.
grid.timezoneHint: All your routines run in this timezone.

chat.intakePlaceholder: Describe what you'd like to automate…

row.deleteDescription: This can't be undone. Its chat history stays untouched.

summary.everyHourStart: Runs at the start of every hour
summary.monthly: Runs on the {ordinal} of every month at {time}
summary.everyNMonths: Runs on the {ordinal} of every {months} months at {time}

trigger.waitingFirstEvent: Active. Waiting for the first event.
trigger.statusRevokedHint: This app was turned off for this agent.
trigger.webhookRowSummary: When its webhook address is called

webhook.unsupportedBody: Creating a webhook address needs the latest version of Houston.

dialog.title: Your webhook address
dialog.subtitle: Send a request to this address to wake the routine.
dialog.warning: Save the secret key now. It will not be shown again.

rotateConfirm.title: Create a new key?
rotateConfirm.body: This creates a new secret key and turns off the old one. Anything using the old key stops working until you update it.
